lol.BannedChampion._description: A champion banned during champion select.
lol.BannedChampion.championId: Champion ID of the banned champion.
lol.BannedChampion.pickTurn: Turn in the ban phase when this champion was banned.
lol.BannedChampion.teamId: Team ID that made this ban (100 = blue, 200 = red).

lol.ChallengeConfigInfo._description: Configuration data for a single LoL challenge.
lol.ChallengeConfigInfo.id: Unique numeric identifier for the challenge.
lol.ChallengeConfigInfo.leaderboard: Whether this challenge has a public leaderboard.
lol.ChallengeConfigInfo.localizedNames: Localized names and descriptions keyed by locale code.
lol.ChallengeConfigInfo.thresholds: Point thresholds required for each tier level. CHALLENGER and GRANDMASTER may be absent for some challenges.

lol.ChallengePercentiles._description:
Percentile breakdowns for all challenges, keyed by numeric challenge ID.

Each key is a challenge ID mapping to an object of tier-level percentile values
(0.0 to 1.0). Use bracket notation to access: `percentiles[challengeId]`.

lol.ChampionInfo.freeChampionIds: Champion IDs in the current free rotation.
lol.ChampionInfo.freeChampionIdsForNewPlayers: Champion IDs in the free rotation for new players (below maxNewPlayerLevel).
lol.ChampionInfo.maxNewPlayerLevel: Maximum summoner level for the new player free rotation.

lol.ChampionMastery._description: Champion mastery data for a single champion on a summoner's account.
lol.ChampionMastery.championPoints: Total mastery points earned on this champion.
lol.ChampionMastery.championPointsSinceLastLevel: Points earned since the last mastery level-up.
lol.ChampionMastery.championPointsUntilNextLevel: Points needed to reach the next mastery level. 0 if at max level.
lol.ChampionMastery.championSeasonMilestone: Current season milestone achieved for this champion.
lol.ChampionMastery.lastPlayTime: Last time this champion was played, as epoch milliseconds.
lol.ChampionMastery.markRequiredForNextLevel: Number of marks required for the next mastery level.
lol.ChampionMastery.nextSeasonMilestone: Requirements and rewards for the next season milestone.
lol.ChampionMastery.tokensEarned: Number of mastery tokens earned toward the next level.

lol.CurrentGameParticipant._description: A participant in a live (current) game.
lol.CurrentGameParticipant.bot: Whether this participant is a bot.
lol.CurrentGameParticipant.championId: Champion ID selected by this participant.

lol.GameCustomizationObject._description: A game customization entry (e.g., ward skin, emote).

lol.LolCurrentGameInfo._description: Live (in-progress) game information from the spectator API.
lol.LolCurrentGameInfo.gameLength: Current length of the game in seconds.
lol.LolCurrentGameInfo.gameStartTime: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the game started.
lol.LolCurrentGameInfo.mapId: Map ID (e.g., 11 = Summoner's Rift, 12 = Howling Abyss).
lol.LolCurrentGameInfo.participants: List of participants in this game.
lol.LolCurrentGameInfo.platformId: Platform ID where this game is being played (e.g., "NA1").

lol.LolLeagueEntry._description: A ranked league entry for a single summoner in a specific queue.
lol.LolLeagueEntry.freshBlood: Whether this player recently joined this tier.
lol.LolLeagueEntry.hotStreak: Whether this player is currently on a winning streak.
lol.LolLeagueEntry.leagueId: Unique identifier for the league this entry belongs to.
lol.LolLeagueEntry.rank: Division rank within the tier (I = highest, IV = lowest).
lol.LolLeagueEntry.veteran: Whether this player has played over 100 games in this queue.

lol.LolMatch._description: Full match data including game info, participants, and teams.
lol.LolMatch.info: Detailed match information including participants, game settings, and results.
lol.LolMatch.metadata: Match metadata including data version and participant PUUIDs.

lol.LolMatchTimeline._description: Frame-by-frame timeline data for a match.
lol.LolMatchTimeline.info: Timeline info with frames containing events and participant snapshots at each interval.
lol.LolMatchTimeline.metadata: Match metadata including data version and participant PUUIDs.

lol.LolPlatformData._description: Platform status data including incidents and scheduled maintenances.
lol.LolPlatformData.locales: Supported locale codes for the platform.
lol.LolPlatformData.name: Human-readable platform name (e.g., "North America").

lol.LolSummoner._description: Summoner profile data from the Riot API.
lol.LolSummoner.revisionDate: Date summoner was last modified, as epoch milliseconds.

lol.Observer._description: Observer encryption key for spectating a game.
lol.Observer.encryptionKey: Encryption key used to spectate this game.

lol.Perks._description: Rune (perk) configuration for a game participant.

lol.PlayerInfo._description: A player's challenge progress, preferences, and point totals.
lol.PlayerInfo.categoryPoints: Points earned per challenge category (COLLECTION, EXPERTISE, IMAGINATION, TEAMWORK, VETERANCY).
lol.PlayerInfo.preferences: Player's challenge display preferences (banner, title, etc.).
lol.PlayerInfo.totalPoints: Aggregated challenge points across all categories.

lol.Tournament._description: A Clash tournament with its schedule and theme.
lol.Tournament.nameKey: Localization key for the tournament name.
lol.Tournament.nameKeySecondary: Secondary localization key for the tournament name.
lol.Tournament.schedule: Scheduled phases for this tournament (registration and start times).

lor.Content._description: Localized content string with a locale identifier

lor.LorLeaderboard._description:
Legends of Runeterra ranked leaderboard data.

Contains the top players for a given region's ranked ladder.
lor.LorLeaderboard.players: Array of ranked players with their LP, name, and rank position

lor.LorPlatformData._description:
Legends of Runeterra platform status data.

Contains active incidents and scheduled maintenances for the LoR platform.
lor.LorPlatformData.name: Human-readable platform name

lor.Status._description: A status entry representing an incident or maintenance event
lor.Status.archive_at: Time when the status was archived
lor.Status.created_at: Time when the status was created

lor.Update._description: A status update entry within an incident or maintenance
lor.Update.author: Author of the update
lor.Update.updated_at: Time the update was last modified

riftbound.Card._description:
A card in the Riftbound card game.

Contains all metadata, art references, stats, and tags for a single card.
riftbound.Card.collectorNumber: Card collector number within its set
riftbound.Card.name: Card name
riftbound.Card.set: Set identifier this card belongs to

riftbound.CardArt._description: Artwork references for a Riftbound card

riftbound.CardStats._description: Gameplay statistics for a Riftbound card

riftbound.RiftboundContent._description:
Riftbound content data including all card sets and metadata.

Contains the full game content catalog with versioning information.
riftbound.RiftboundContent.lastUpdated: ISO timestamp of last content update
riftbound.RiftboundContent.sets: Array of card sets, each containing its cards

riftbound.Set._description: A set of cards in Riftbound
riftbound.Set.name: Set name

riot.Account._description: Riot account information linked to a Riot ID.
riot.Account.gameName: In-game name component of the Riot ID.
riot.Account.tagLine: Tag component of the Riot ID (e.g., "NA1").

tft.BannedChampion._description: A banned champion entry in a TFT spectator game
tft.BannedChampion.pickTurn: Pick turn order in champion select
tft.BannedChampion.teamId: Team ID the ban belongs to (100 = blue, 200 = red)

tft.CurrentGameParticipant._description: A participant in a live TFT game
tft.CurrentGameParticipant.bot: Whether this participant is a bot

tft.GameCustomizationObject._description: Game customization data for spectator mode

tft.Observer._description: Observer credentials for spectating a live game
tft.Observer.encryptionKey: Encryption key required to spectate the game

tft.TftCurrentGameInfo._description: Live TFT game information from the spectator API
tft.TftCurrentGameInfo.bannedChampions: List of banned champions in this game
tft.TftCurrentGameInfo.gameStartTime: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the game started
tft.TftCurrentGameInfo.participants: List of participants in this game
tft.TftCurrentGameInfo.platformId: Platform ID where this game is running (e.g., "NA1")

tft.TftLeagueList._description: A TFT ranked league containing a list of entries
tft.TftLeagueList.entries: List of ranked entries in this league
tft.TftLeagueList.name: Display name of this league

tft.TftMatch._description: Full TFT match data including game info and metadata
tft.TftMatch.info: Game information including participants, traits, and units
tft.TftMatch.metadata: Match metadata including data version, match ID, and participant PUUIDs

tft.TftPlatformData._description: TFT platform status data with incidents and maintenances
tft.TftPlatformData.maintenances: List of scheduled or active maintenances
tft.TftPlatformData.name: Display name of the platform (e.g., "North America")

tft.TftSummoner.revisionDate: Date of last profile modification as Unix timestamp in milliseconds

val.Ability._description: Ability effects for a player's agent abilities in a round.
val.Ability.ability1Effects: Effect description for the first ability (C key).
val.Ability.ability2Effects: Effect description for the second ability (Q key).
val.Ability.grenadeEffects: Effect description for the grenade ability (E key).
val.Ability.ultimateEffects: Effect description for the ultimate ability (X key).

val.AbilityCasts._description: Number of times each ability was cast by a player.
val.AbilityCasts.ability1Casts: Number of first ability (C key) casts.
val.AbilityCasts.ability2Casts: Number of second ability (Q key) casts.
val.AbilityCasts.grenadeCasts: Number of grenade ability (E key) casts.
val.AbilityCasts.ultimateCasts: Number of ultimate ability (X key) casts.

val.Act.isActive: Whether this act is currently active.
val.Act.localizedNames: Localized display names keyed by locale code.
val.Act.name: Internal name of the act.

val.Coach._description: A coach in a Valorant match (Premier/tournament matches).
val.Coach.teamId: Team identifier the coach belongs to.

val.Content._description: All game content available in Valorant for a given locale.

val.ContentItem._description: A content item with asset information and localized names.
val.ContentItem.id: Unique identifier for the content item.
val.ContentItem.localizedNames: Localized display names keyed by locale code.
val.ContentItem.name: Display name of the content item.

val.Damage._description: Damage dealt to a specific player in a round.
val.Damage.receiver: Encrypted PUUID of the player who received the damage.

val.Economy._description: A player's economy state for a round.

val.FinishingDamage._description: Information about the finishing blow that killed a player.
val.FinishingDamage.damageItem: Identifier of the item that dealt the finishing damage.
val.FinishingDamage.damageType: Type of damage that killed the player (e.g., "Weapon", "Bomb", "Ability").
val.FinishingDamage.isSecondaryFireMode: Whether the kill used the weapon's secondary fire mode.

val.Kill._description: A kill event in a Valorant match round.
val.Kill.assistants: Encrypted PUUIDs of players who assisted in the kill.
val.Kill.killer: Encrypted PUUID of the player who made the kill.
val.Kill.playerLocations: Positions and view angles of all players at the time of the kill.
val.Kill.timeSinceGameStartMillis: Milliseconds since the game started when the kill occurred.
val.Kill.timeSinceRoundStartMillis: Milliseconds since the round started when the kill occurred.
val.Kill.victim: Encrypted PUUID of the player who was killed.
val.Kill.victimLocation: Map coordinates where the victim died.

val.Leaderboard._description: Ranked leaderboard data for a specific competitive act.
val.Leaderboard.actId: Unique identifier of the competitive act.
val.Leaderboard.players: Leaderboard player entries sorted by rank.
val.Leaderboard.query: Search query used to filter the leaderboard (empty string if no filter).
val.Leaderboard.shard: Shard identifier this leaderboard was retrieved from.
val.Leaderboard.tierDetails: Tier detail information for ranks on this leaderboard.
val.Leaderboard.totalPlayers: Total number of ranked players on the leaderboard.

val.LocalizedNames._description: Localized display names keyed by locale code.

val.MatchInfo.customGameName: Name of the custom game (empty string for non-custom games).
val.MatchInfo.gameLengthMillis: Duration of the match in milliseconds.
val.MatchInfo.gameMode: Game mode played in this match.
val.MatchInfo.gameStartMillis: Epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the match started.
val.MatchInfo.gameVersion: Game client version used for the match.
val.MatchInfo.isRanked: Whether this was a ranked match.
val.MatchInfo.premierMatchInfo: Premier match metadata (empty for non-Premier matches).
val.MatchInfo.queueId: Queue identifier for the match type.
val.MatchInfo.region: Region where the match was played.
val.MatchInfo.seasonId: Season identifier when the match was played.

val.Matchlist._description: A player's match history with match references.

val.MatchlistEntry._description: A single entry in a player's match history.
val.MatchlistEntry.gameStartTimeMillis: Epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the match started.
val.MatchlistEntry.queueId: Queue identifier for the match type.

val.Player._description: A player in a Valorant match.
val.Player.characterId: Identifier of the agent character played.
val.Player.competitiveTier: Competitive tier at time of the match.
val.Player.isObserver: Whether this player was observing the match.
val.Player.partyId: Identifier of the party the player queued with.
val.Player.playerCard: Identifier of the player card cosmetic equipped.
val.Player.playerTitle: Identifier of the player title cosmetic equipped.
val.Player.stats: Aggregate performance statistics for the match.
val.Player.teamId: Team identifier the player belongs to.

val.PlayerLocations._description: Player position and view angle at a moment in time.
val.PlayerLocations.viewRadians: Direction the player was looking in radians.

val.PlayerRoundStats._description: A player's detailed statistics for a single round.
val.PlayerRoundStats.ability: Ability effects triggered during the round.
val.PlayerRoundStats.damage: Damage dealt to other players during the round.
val.PlayerRoundStats.economy: Economy state for the round (credits, loadout).

val.PlayerStats._description: Aggregate performance statistics for a player in a match.
val.PlayerStats.abilityCasts: Total ability casts across all rounds.

val.RecentMatches._description: Recently completed match IDs for a queue.
val.RecentMatches.currentTime: Server time when this data was retrieved (epoch milliseconds).
val.RecentMatches.matchIds: List of recently completed match IDs.

val.RoundResult._description: Detailed result of a single round in a match.
val.RoundResult.bombDefuser: Encrypted PUUID of the player who defused the bomb (empty if not defused).
val.RoundResult.bombPlanter: Encrypted PUUID of the player who planted the bomb (empty if not planted).
val.RoundResult.defuseLocation: Map coordinates where the bomb was defused.
val.RoundResult.defusePlayerLocations: Player positions when the bomb was defused.
val.RoundResult.defuseRoundTime: Milliseconds into the round when the bomb was defused.
val.RoundResult.plantLocation: Map coordinates where the bomb was planted.
val.RoundResult.plantPlayerLocations: Player positions when the bomb was planted.
val.RoundResult.plantRoundTime: Milliseconds into the round when the bomb was planted.
val.RoundResult.plantSite: Bomb site where the spike was planted (e.g., "A", "B", "C").
val.RoundResult.playerStats: Per-player detailed statistics for this round.
val.RoundResult.roundCeremony: Visual ceremony played at end of round (e.g., "CeremonyDefault").
val.RoundResult.winningTeam: Team identifier of the winning team.
val.RoundResult.winningTeamRole: Role of the winning team in this round (e.g., "attack", "defense").

val.Status._description: A platform status entry (incident or maintenance).
val.Status.archive_at: Timestamp when this status entry will be archived.
val.Status.created_at: Timestamp when this status entry was created.
val.Status.titles: Localized title strings for this status entry.
val.Status.updated_at: Timestamp when this status entry was last updated.
val.Status.updates: Chronological updates to this status entry.

val.Team._description: A team in a Valorant match.
val.Team.roundsPlayed: Total rounds played by the team.
val.Team.roundsWon: Number of rounds won by the team.
val.Team.won: Whether this team won the match.

val.Tier._description: Tier detail information for ranked leaderboards.

val.Update._description: A single update to a platform status entry.
val.Update.author: Author of the update.
val.Update.created_at: Timestamp when the update was created.
val.Update.id: Unique numeric identifier for the update.
val.Update.publish: Whether the update should be publicly visible.
val.Update.publish_locations: Where the update should be published.
val.Update.translations: Localized translations of the update content.
val.Update.updated_at: Timestamp when the update was last modified.

val.ValMatch._description: Complete data for a Valorant match including players, rounds, and teams.
val.ValMatch.coaches: Coaches participating in the match (Premier/tournament only).
val.ValMatch.matchInfo: Match metadata including mode, map, timing, and identifiers.
val.ValMatch.players: All players in the match with their stats and agent selections.
val.ValMatch.roundResults: Detailed results for each round of the match.
val.ValMatch.teams: Teams in the match with their scores and win status.

val.ValPlatformData._description: Platform status data for a Valorant shard.
val.ValPlatformData.name: Display name of the platform.
